hero.subtitle:
With AI, you can fly.
The launchpad for the AI Agent era.
hero.funnel: Start free with Ollama → Deploy to Zeabur cloud → Expand AI skills

vision.descLeft1: The AI Agent market is exploding — from personal assistants to enterprise automation, 2026 is the year everyone can have an AI partner. But most people don't know where to start.
vision.descLeft2: What hardware to choose? How to install software? How to run an Agent? CanFly.ai solves all these questions at once.
vision.descRight1: We are the knowledge guide to the AI Agent world. From free experiences to hardware recommendations, from white-glove setup to community support — we take you from zero to takeoff.
vision.descRight2: Not just a tool platform, but a community. Every user has their own flight log, showcasing your AI Agent, sharing your setup, and inspiring others.
vision.stat2Label: Want to use AI but don't know where to start
vision.stat3Label: From zero to takeoff with CanFly

apps.noAppsHint: Try adjusting your search or category filter

ollama.description: Run powerful AI models locally without requiring API keys or internet connection. Perfect for privacy-conscious users and development environments.

zeabur.description: Deploy your OpenClaw agents to the cloud with zero configuration. Get started in minutes with our affiliate partnership.

elevenlabs.description: Add realistic voice capabilities to your OpenClaw agents. High-quality text-to-speech with multiple voice options.

heygen.description: Create professional AI-generated videos with digital avatars. Perfect for content creation, marketing, and training materials.

umbrel.description: Run your own personal cloud server at home. Host AI models, apps, and services with complete data sovereignty.

tutorial.congratsDesc: You've successfully run AI locally. Now You Can Fly!

ollama.title: Run Your First Local AI in 5 Minutes
ollama.subtitle: Free, offline, completely private — run large language models on your own computer with Ollama

steps.title: Choose Install Method
steps.content: Choose the installation method that works best for you. Mac beginners should download Ollama.app (includes a built-in chat interface); advanced users can use the terminal.
steps.expectedResult: After installation, Ollama will automatically start running in the background.

items.a: Go to System Settings → Privacy & Security, click "Open Anyway". This is macOS's security mechanism for unsigned apps.
Reopen your terminal, or run source ~/.zshrc to reload environment variables.
Run the installer as Administrator. Right-click → Run as administrator.

installTabs.guiDesc:
Official Ollama macOS app with built-in graphical chat interface.
Download, drag to Applications, double-click and start chatting with AI. No terminal, no commands needed.
guiSteps: Drag Ollama.app to the Applications folder
Double-click to open; the Ollama icon will appear in the menu bar
Click the icon, select "Chat" to open the built-in chat interface
Choose a model and start chatting!
installTabs.terminalConfirm: After installation, Ollama service will start automatically. Verify installation:
installTabs.winDesc: Download the Windows version from the official Ollama website and follow the installation wizard.

steps.title: Download Your First AI Model
steps.content: An AI model is like the AI's "brain". Different models are good at different things. Let's download a lightweight model suitable for chatting.

subsections.label: What is a model?
subsections.text: A model is an AI program trained on massive amounts of data. Like different experts having different specialties, different models excel at different tasks. Model file sizes range from 2GB to 40GB+.

steps.expectedResult: After download completes, it will show success. You can use ollama list to check installed models.
tips: First download requires internet; after that you can use completely offline
Model files are stored locally, no data is uploaded
Low on disk space? Just install llama3.2 for now

items.a: Model files are large, ensure stable internet. You can also try a smaller model like llama3.2.
Use ollama list to check installed models, use ollama rm <model> to remove unneeded models.

steps.title: Test Interactive Chat
steps.content: Let's chat with your local AI and make sure everything is working!
steps.expectedResult: The AI will respond to your questions with text. Response speed depends on your hardware specs.
tips: First time running a model is slower (needs to load into memory); it gets faster after
Press Ctrl+D or type /bye to exit the chat
Try asking questions in different languages to experience multilingual capabilities

items.a: Normal! Loading a model for the first time takes time. If consistently slow, try the smaller llama3.2 model.
Close other applications to free up memory, or switch to a smaller model.

steps.title: Connect to OpenClaw
steps.content: OpenClaw is an open-source AI interface that connects to your local Ollama, giving you a better user experience.
steps.expectedResult: OpenClaw can now use your local Ollama models. Completely free, completely offline!
tips: OpenClaw automatically detects all your installed models
You can switch between different models in OpenClaw at any time
Want to use it on your phone? You can later deploy to Zeabur cloud

items.a: Confirm Ollama is running: type ollama list in terminal. If no response, restart Ollama.

items.q: What to put for API address?
items.a: Default is http://localhost:11434, unless you've changed it.

steps.title: Next Steps
steps.content: Congratulations! You've got AI running on your own computer. Here's what to explore next:
tips: All models are free to use
Your data never leaves your computer
Join the CanFly community to connect with other users

nextStepCards.title: Deploy to Cloud
nextStepCards.desc: One-click deploy with Zeabur to make your AI available anywhere. Use code OpenClaw for 10% off.

nextStepCards.title: Add Voice Features
nextStepCards.desc: Use ElevenLabs to give your AI a voice, with Chinese text-to-speech support.

nextStepCards.title: Generate AI Videos
nextStepCards.desc: Use HeyGen to create AI avatar videos, perfect for education and marketing content.

nextStepCards.title: Explore More Models
nextStepCards.desc: Browse hundreds of models in the Ollama library: text, code, vision, and more.
